name: Bolt.new
description: Full-stack AI app builder. Describe any web app and get a live, deployable project in seconds. Built on StackBlitz with Claude and GPT support.

name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's flagship AI assistant. Handles writing, coding, maths, research, image generation, and custom GPTs. Includes a free tier.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant with standout reasoning, long-context understanding, and careful writing. Great for documents and complex analysis.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code. Chat with your codebase, auto-complete entire functions, and fix bugs instantly with GPT-4 integration.

name: DeepSeek
description: Open-source AI model with strong coding and maths reasoning. Competitive with top models at a fraction of the API cost.

name: ElevenLabs
description: Realistic AI voice synthesis and cloning. Generate natural-sounding speech in any language from text, or clone your own voice with a short sample.

name: Google Gemini
description: Google's multimodal AI assistant with live search integration, image understanding, and deep Google Workspace connections.

name: Grok
description: xAI's conversational AI with real-time X/Twitter data access, strong reasoning, and image generation capabilities.

name: Hugging Face
description: The hub for open-source AI. Browse, download, and deploy thousands of models, datasets, and Spaces demos.

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generator with best-in-class text rendering inside images. Perfect for logos, posters, and designs that need readable text in the visual.

name: Kling AI
description: High-quality text-to-video and image-to-video AI from Kuaishou. Generates up to 2-minute realistic video clips with strong motion consistency.

name: Leonardo AI
description: AI image generation platform tailored for game assets, concept art, and illustrations with fine-tuned style models.

name: Luma AI
description: AI video generation (Dream Machine) and 3D scene capture. Generate cinematic videos from text/images and create interactive 3D NeRF captures.

name: Midjourney
description: Premium AI art generator producing highly detailed, stylised images from text prompts. Runs through Discord or the web app.

name: Mistral AI
description: European open-source AI lab producing high-efficiency language models. Mistral and Mixtral models rival GPT-4 while being faster and cheaper to run.

name: NotebookLM
description: Google's AI research assistant. Upload docs, PDFs, and notes, then ask questions and generate summaries grounded in your own sources. Includes Audio Overview podcast mode.

name: OpenAI
description: AI research company behind ChatGPT and the GPT-4 API. Access models, DALL·E image generation, and Sora video AI.

name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered answer engine that cites its sources. Ask any question and get a researched response with live web references.

name: Pika Labs
description: AI video generation platform that turns text, images, and video clips into creative short videos. Great for content creators and social media.

name: Runway ML
description: Professional AI creative suite for video generation, image editing, and motion. Used by filmmakers and designers for next-gen content production.

name: Sora
description: OpenAI's text-to-video AI. Generate high-quality cinematic video clips from text prompts. One of the most advanced video generation models available.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Stability AI's open-source image generation model. Run locally or via API. The backbone behind countless AI art tools and workflows.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: Generate React UI components from text prompts. Describe a UI, get production-ready shadcn/Tailwind code instantly. Built by Vercel.
